risk_bands.description: Prioritizes capital protection; suitable for short horizons.
Balances growth and capital preservation; suitable for medium horizons.
Focuses on high growth; willing to tolerate short-term capital volatility.

handoff_triggers.condition: Selected scheme is marked with regulated_escalation_required = true
handoff_triggers.action_required: Schedule physical sign-off and suitability review

handoff_triggers.condition: Investable surplus or transaction request > 10,000,000 INR
handoff_triggers.action_required: Direct routing to Senior RM for custom portfolio structuring

handoff_triggers.condition: Age > 60 AND Risk Band is Aggressive
handoff_triggers.action_required: Mandatory manual validation of risk tolerances to prevent mis-selling

handoff_triggers.condition: Selected goal type is Estate Planning or Trust Setup
